description_long: This is a modern, rectangular cabinet with a unique design featuring a large, circular platform or tabletop integrated into one side. The cabinet includes two drawers of different sizes on one end, both with visible handles, and an open shelf space beneath the circular platform. The main body is solid and boxy, with clean, straight lines and a smooth, matte finish. The circular platform appears slightly elevated above the main surface, possibly functioning as a rotating or fixed display area. The color is a uniform light gray, and the overall construction suggests it is made primarily of wood or engineered wood, possibly with some metal hardware for the drawers. The design is functional and contemporary, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern offices.
description: A modern, light gray cabinet with two drawers, an open shelf, and a large circular tabletop integrated on one side. The design is sleek and functional, with a smooth matte finish and visible handles.
description_view_0: Side view showing the circular tabletop and the solid rectangular body with a visible oval accent on the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular tabletop centered above the main body and the drawers on the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the two drawers with handles, the open shelf, and the circular tabletop extending from the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the cabinet and the protruding drawers.
